topic: The most expensive thing in this restaurant is not on the menu.

slides.title: This restaurant's biggest cost is not on the menu.
It is the phone calls that go unanswered during service.
slides.body: Your team is on the floor. Serving tables. Running food. Nobody can pick up. The callers don't leave voicemails. They book somewhere else.

slides.title: One Friday night. 12 missed calls.
slides.body: A restaurant owner I work with had no idea it was happening. Nobody tracks missed calls.

slides.title: At £40 a head for a table of four, that is nearly £2,000 in one evening.
slides.body: Not lost to bad food or bad service. Lost to a phone that rang and nobody answered.

slides.title: I did not build him a marketing campaign.
slides.body: I built him an AI voice agent in 3 days. It answers every call, takes the reservation, and sends a WhatsApp confirmation. Configured for his menu, his hours, his booking rules.

slides.title: He listened for 10 minutes. Then he said: "When can we start?"
slides.body: We are meeting next week to finalise everything.

slides.title: Most small businesses do not need more marketing.
slides.body: They need to stop losing the customers who are already trying to reach them.

slides.title: If you have never counted your missed calls, that is the most expensive number in your business.
slides.body: Send me a message and I will show you what the fix looks like.
